advanceBlock(uint256).details: Advance block to create distinct checkpoints

lock(uint256,uint256).details: Fuzzed lock: pick a random actor and lock a bounded amount

targetSenders().details: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

unlock(uint256,uint256).details: Fuzzed unlock: pick a random actor and unlock a bounded amount

documentation.text: @dev Fuzzed lock: pick a random actor and lock a bounded amount
@dev Fuzzed unlock: pick a random actor and unlock a bounded amount
@dev Advance block to create distinct checkpoints

@title VotingLockerHandler — Stateful fuzz handler for VotingLocker invariant testing
 @dev Drives lock/unlock operations with fuzzed inputs and tracks ghost variables.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (contract VotingLocker,contract ArmadaToken,address[] memory) returns (contract VotingLockerHandler)

documentation.text: @notice totalLocked matches sum of all individual locked balances
@notice Individual ghost balances match contract balances
@notice ARM token conservation: locker balance = totalLocked
@notice Total ARM in system is conserved (actors + locker = initial funding)
@notice No individual locked balance exceeds their initial funding
@title VotingLockerInvariantTest — Foundry invariant test suite for VotingLocker
